message:
feat(fwc): add CommandTruthMode taxonomy and output semantics for truthfulness beads 29.7.3/29.9

CommandAvailability: compact_label(), help_text(), cli_symbol(), severity_rank(), Display impl
CommandEnvelope: compact_line(), transcript_entry(), help_banner(), exit_code(), Display impl
CommandTruthMode enum (LiveOnly/OfflineOnly/Hybrid/Passthrough/PlannedOnly)
CommandFamilyEntry + COMMAND_FAMILY_CLASSIFICATION static table (45 commands classified)
classify_command() lookup function
Fixed planned(), guide, batch-file dispatch to inject CommandEnvelope
+33 readiness tests for truth-boundary classification (352 total)
